sources: NEA (National Education Association) Teacher Preparation Standards
State DOE Certification Requirements (FL, NY, TX)
Teach For America and TNTP Selection Criteria
K-12 and Higher Ed Job Market Data

smart.label: Certifications and Subject-Area Prep
what_counts: Education major or subject-area degree with education minor
Teaching certifications (state-specific) or certification in progress
Relevant coursework: pedagogy, curriculum, assessment, child development
Subject-area depth (e.g. Math, English, Science for secondary)

grit.label: Teaching Experience and Ownership
what_counts: Student teaching with clear placement and duration
Tutoring or mentoring with quantified hours and outcomes
Leadership in education orgs (Future Educators, tutoring center)
Curriculum design or lesson planning with scope
Quantified impact: students served, hours, grade improvement

build.label: Student Impact Evidence
what_counts: Student teaching with cooperating teacher and school named
Tutoring outcomes: students served, subject areas, improvement
Lesson plans or curriculum units with clear scope
Field placements or practicum with dates and setting
Service in schools: volunteer, camp counselor, youth programs

common_gaps.gap: No student teaching or practicum before graduation
common_gaps.fix: Student teaching is required for certification in most states. Ensure your program includes a full practicum. List placement, grade level, and cooperating teacher.
Tutor through your university, volunteer at a local school, or work as a camp counselor. Even 20-50 hours of direct student contact is a baseline signal.

common_gaps.gap: Certification status not clear on resume
common_gaps.fix: List certification (or 'In progress, expected [date]'). Name the state and subject area. Schools screen on this first.
Add numbers: students tutored, hours per week, grade improvement, or class size. 'Tutored 15 students in algebra' beats 'tutored students.'
Use terms recruiters expect: differentiated instruction, formative assessment, IEP, ELL, classroom management. Name your pedagogy coursework.
